name: Cheddar Fruit Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add vanilla extract and stir in.
3. Mix in baking soda and large egg.
4. Gradually add flour, salt, and granulated sugar, stirring until well combined.
5. Fold in shredded Cheddar cheese, chopped Maraschino cherries, and crushed pineapple.
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
